template.name: Text To Speech Player
template.t:
<!DOCTYPE html>
                
                    

                        
                        
                        Text-to-Speech Reader
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                            startCommonAppsAI();
                        
                        
                        

                            

                                

                                    

                                        Go to Pi Browser
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                
                                

                                    

                                        Pay Pi to GET PREMIUM
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                    

                                        

                                        Or here to test this app
                                    
                                
                                

                                    Loading...
                                
                            
                        
                        
                        
                        
You need to access from Pi Browser.
                        
                    
                    

                        

                            
                            
                                $( document ).ready(function() {
                                    $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                    $("#google_translate_element").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                    
                                    $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").show();
                                    $("#google_translate_element").show();
                                });
                            
                            
                            

                            
                            
                            

                                
                            
                            
                            
Text-to-Speech Reader
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            

                                Characters: 0 / 4000
                                
Text is too long for stable playback. Please shorten it.
                            

                            
                            

                                
                                
                                

                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                        Upload .txt or .pdf (will read only text, not images) file
                                    
                                

                                
                                

                                    
                                        Select a voice
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                            
                                Trim Text to 4000 Chars
                            

                            
                            

                                
                                    Play
                                
                                

                                    
                                        Pause
                                    
                                    
                                        Stop
